summary: Make Job Title available to Group
description: Makes a Job Title available to a Group it was not previously available to.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

parameters.name: job_title_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Job Title.

schema.description: Response schema containing a list of Group IDs.

group_ids.description: Array of unique identifiers for Groups.

schema.description: Request body for adding or removing a Job Title from a Group.

group_id.description: UUID of the Group the Job Title is being added to or removed from.
